chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-598 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For orders on Misc. No.2631/2026 (Urgent Application) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 3. For orders on Misc. No.2632/2026 (Exemption Application) 4. For orders on Misc. No.2633/2026 (Stay Application) 5. For hearing of main case 03.02.2026 Mr. Abdul Rauf, Advocate alongwith petitioner ---------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2,4&5. Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the case at some length does not press instant petition with a prayer to approach proper forum. Order accordingly. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
